name: tsmooth-productions
description: T-Smooth Productions - Full Stack Application by SwanyThree & Domino Entertainment Ent.

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:deploy: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server

author: SwanyThree & Domino Entertainment Ent.
